title: CHRONIC CARE MEDICAL CLINIC - 211info
text: COMMUNITY HEALTH PARTNERS CHRONIC CARE MEDICAL CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides short-term care (up to 90 days) to patients with asthma, diabetes, high blood pressure, and depression. After 90 days, the patient is assigned to a primary care provider that can continue working with them. 945 Washington Way Suite 141 Longview, WA 98632 Eligibility: Uninsured adults age 18 and older Hours: Tuesday 9am-noon, Wednesday 5pm-8pm, Thursday noon-3pm Email (360) 442-4165 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (360) 442-4165 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: By appointment only FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Columbia County Services: Chronic Disease Self Management Programs * People Without Health Insurance Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - VISION CLINIC OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - URGENT CARE CLINIC SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COMMUNITY HEALTH PARTNERS
